info.title: Stocksmith API
info.description: REST API for reading and writing materials, products, recipes, and manufactures.

bearer_auth.description: Personal API key (cb_live_...) passed as a Bearer token

subscription_plan.description: Subscription plan name, or null if none

parameters.name: category_name
parameters.description: Partial category name filter (case-insensitive substring match)

default_variation_id.description: ID of the default active variation, or null if archived
ID of the default active variation, or null if archived

get.description: Requires financial access (view_material_costs permission). Returns 403 if the authenticated user lacks this permission.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter by purchase date on or after this ISO 8601 date (e.g. 2026-01-01)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter by purchase date on or before this ISO 8601 date (e.g. 2026-12-31)

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Filter by last-modified on or after this ISO 8601 timestamp

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter by line item category ID

material_id.description: ID of the material on this line

material_expense.description: True when this line is a material purchase

get.description: Requires financial access (view_material_costs permission). Returns 403 if the authenticated user lacks this permission.

material_id.description: ID of the material on this line

material_expense.description: True when this line is a material purchase

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state. Defaults to 'active'. 'all' returns active + archived.

parameters.name: category_name
parameters.description: Partial category name filter (case-insensitive substring match)

get.summary: Health check — verifies the Bearer token is valid

parameters.name: category_name
parameters.description: Partial category name filter (case-insensitive substring match)

default_variation_id.description: ID of the default active variation, or null if archived
ID of the default active variation, or null if archived

total_cost.description: Total materials cost. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_cost.description: Per-unit materials cost. Omitted for view-only users.

total_labour_cost.description: Total estimated labour cost. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_labour_cost.description: Per-unit estimated labour cost. Omitted for view-only users.

total_cogs.description: Total cost of goods sold. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_cogs.description: Per-unit cost of goods sold. Omitted for view-only users.

total_cost.description: Total materials cost. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_cost.description: Per-unit materials cost. Omitted for view-only users.

total_labour_cost.description: Total estimated labour cost. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_labour_cost.description: Per-unit estimated labour cost. Omitted for view-only users.

total_cogs.description: Total cost of goods sold. Omitted for view-only users.

unit_cogs.description: Per-unit cost of goods sold. Omitted for view-only users.
